family.about: I come from a supportive family that has always encouraged education, discipline, and continuous learning.
family.influence: My family taught me the importance of staying grounded, working hard, and thinking long-term while pursuing meaningful goals.

personality.enthusiasm: I'm passionate about technology, problem-solving, and building products that create real value.

videoEditing.interest: I enjoy video editing and creating engaging content.
videoEditing.why: It allows me to combine creativity, storytelling, and technical skills, much like software development.

gaming.interest: I enjoy playing VALORANT in my free time.
gaming.why: It challenges strategic thinking, communication, quick decision-making, and teamwork.

phone.description: I appreciate products with clean design, reliability, and a polished user experience.

technology.interest: I enjoy exploring new software, developer tools, cloud technologies, and productivity applications.

car.whyILoveIt: I admire its engineering, driving dynamics, and build quality.
car.drivingExperience: It offers confident handling, precise steering, and a balance of performance and practicality.
car.whatItSaysAboutMe: I value thoughtful engineering, reliability, and long-term quality over flashy design.
